attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   ST.TRANSACTION_ID ,
   ST.APPLICATION_NAME ,
   ST.APPLICATION_ID ,
   ST.LEDGER_ID      ,
   ST.ORG_ID         ,
   ST.TRX_CLASS  ,
   ST.ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
   ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   ST.TRX_NUMBER    ,
   ST.TRX_DATE       ,
   ST.TRX_LINE_ID    ,
   ST.TRX_LINE_NUM   ,
   ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
   ST.AMOUNT,
   ST.QUANTITY_INVOICED  AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
   ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
   ST.PROCESS_STATUS,
   ST.ELEMENT_TYPE   ,
   ST.RULE_START_DATE,
   ST.RULE_END_DATE  ,
   ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION ,
   ST.ATTRIBUTE1 ,
   ST.ATTRIBUTE2 ,
   ST.ATTRIBUTE3 ,
   ST.ATTRIBUTE4 ,
   ST.ATTRIBUTE5 ,
   ST.ATTRIBUTE6 ,
   ST.SKU,
   ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,  
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME   , 
   USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
   ST.ATTRIBUTE11, /*Q4FY16 OA Changes*/
   ST.ATTRIBUTE12, /* prmaddal : Added OA_ATTRIB_ID as part of Q1FY17 Changes */
   ST.ATTRIBUTE13,  /* prmaddal : Added ATTRIB_ID as part of Q1FY17 Changes */
   ST.ATTRIBUTE9,
   ST.ATTRIBUTION_CODE,
   ST.ATTRIBUTE21
  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S  ST
    WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S  EL
    WHERE 
    EL.TRANSACTION_ID= ST.TRANSACTION_ID      
    AND EL.APPLICATION_ID = ST.APPLICATION_ID)
